name: codecortex
description: Code intelligence skills via MCP — codebase analysis, graph queries, refactoring, architecture audit, cross-IDE memory, and project scaffolding

interface.shortDescription: Code intelligence via MCP: analysis, graph, refactor, audit, knowledge graph, cross-IDE memory
interface.longDescription: CodeCortex is a production-grade MCP server for code intelligence. This plugin gives AI agents structured skills for codebase analysis, semantic search, graph queries, safe refactoring, architecture audit, knowledge extraction from docs, cross-IDE memory search, and project scaffolding. 6 unified MCP tools, 39+ actions, 35 languages.
